title: Vein Pickaxe by Juix
description:
Datapack adding a vein mining pickaxe
(aka Ore Excavator)
body:
# ℹ️ Vein Pickaxe By Juix The Vein Pickaxe pack adds a vein mining pickaxe to your game. Crafted from diamond and amethyst, it destroys ore veins with a single pick !

![Intro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd5515ebded4fa53ba27fd2b09c2afb66c5c28f0_0.webp) # ⚠️ Resourcepack needed You have to download Juix Resources [v1.3] (or later) to enable the custom textures (datapack version only)
[Juix Resources [v1.3+]](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/juix-resources/versions)
# ⚒️ Recipes Since this is a data pack, the crafts will not be displayed in JEI or REI. - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_chat**_ | shows recipes in chat - _**/trigger show_recipes_in_browser**_ | easier to read : it generates a chat link that displays all recipes included in my packs (if they are installed) You can craft the Vein Pickaxe this way :

![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e14f1132e127be47bb6e98e4ae1c7c19d24411b1.png)
# 🆕 Features & Options - **_/function datapack:juix_datapacks/toggle_sneak_bypass_** | To enable or disable (disabled by default) Sneak bypass (vein pickaxes stop working when sneaking)
# 🪳 Known issues - This pack relies on item drop coordinates, please be careful with Magnet mods for example (Magnets by Juix is fully compatible with Hammers) Quick report - https://juixcode.github.io/contact
# 🔃 Ask for a version You can **report a bug** or ask me to **update one of my pack to a specific version**, using one of these contact methods : - Quick message - https://juixcode.github.io/contact - My mail - juixcontact@gmail.com - The Discord server - clikc-here-to-join
# ❤️ Donations If you like my packs, you can tip me on my Ko-Fi page. Thank you so much if you do !
https://ko-fi.com/juixcode
